resolution_summary: Fixed in EXP-468-HOL-MISSING-c2-reactive-prose-pattern.json. Changed 'After six weeks of prose updates, it remains untripped.' to 'After multiple post-April-2026 prose updates, it remains untripped.' Removes the dated 'six weeks' anchor that would become stale as the HTML persists; replaces with durable relative phrasing anchored to April 2026.
action_for_decider: integrate EXP-468 (now revised); close ISS-2406 as resolved
